parsed.production_notes: The video is primarily a screen recording of a staged video call, but it is heavily intercut with professionally shot B-roll footage and animated graphic overlays to illustrate the app's features.

characters.appearance: A man in his late 20s or early 30s with a medium build and a dark complexion. He has short black hair styled up, a full, well-groomed beard and mustache, and wears black-rimmed glasses.
A young man in his early 20s with a medium build and a dark complexion. He has short, dark hair and a mustache. He appears friendly and earnest.
characters.wardrobe: A bright orange polo shirt with a small logo on the left chest.
characters.demeanor: Initially nervous and hesitant, becoming more confident and agreeable.

characters.appearance: A young man in his mid-20s with a medium build, dark complexion, short dark hair, and a well-groomed beard. He is seen in a dimly lit room.
A woman in her late 20s or early 30s with a slim build and a warm, medium complexion. She has dark hair tied back neatly.
characters.wardrobe: A traditional green and red saree with gold jewelry.

characters.appearance: A man in his late 20s with a slim build and a medium complexion. He has dark, medium-length hair and a full beard.
characters.wardrobe: A light beige or cream-colored button-down shirt.

characters.appearance: A woman in her mid-20s with a fair complexion and a slim build. She has shoulder-length dark hair with reddish highlights and a fringe, and a prominent tattoo on her left bicep.
characters.demeanor: Serious and focused on her conversation.

characters.appearance: A young man in his early 20s with a slim build and a fair complexion. He has thick, curly dark hair.

scenes.setting: A video call on a laptop screen. Character A is in a modern home office with framed art on the wall. Character B is against a plain, light blue background. There is a brief cutaway to a room with yellow walls and a spinning ceiling fan.
scenes.camera: Screen recording of a video call, with a brief cutaway to a low-angle shot.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up shot of Character A, a man with glasses and a beard, sitting in his home office. He is looking slightly to his right, as if speaking to someone on a video call, and gestures with his hands. The background shows a wall with three framed pictures and a modern desk lamp.

A medium close-up shot of Character B, a young man with a mustache, looking directly at the camera. He has a slightly nervous but friendly expression, and occasionally smiles or nods. He is positioned against a plain, light blue, evenly lit background.

scenes.visual_description: A close-up shot of a laptop screen displaying a video call between Character A (left) and Character B (right). The call is in a vertical split-screen format. Around 11 seconds, there is a brief cutaway to a low-angle shot of a spinning ceiling fan in a room with yellow walls and curtains, before returning to the video call. Subtitles and text overlays appear throughout the scene.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Tell me about yourself.

Character B says: Sir... Can I speak in mother tongue? Not comfortable in English.

Character A says: But you studied in English medium, right?

Character B says: Yes.

Character A says: See, you're comfortable in your native language, right? How? Because you have been speaking in this language since you were a kid. That's the reason you're able to speak fluently. If you follow the same for the language English, you can also master it very quickly.

scenes.setting: The video call continues. Cutaways show Character C in a dark room with a holographic AI robot, a split-screen call between Character E and Character D in a well-lit living room, and another split-screen call between Character F and Character G in different indoor settings.
scenes.camera: The scene alternates between the screen-recorded video call and various professionally shot cutaways (medium shots, split-screens).

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up shot of Character A in his home office. He is actively speaking and gesturing to explain a concept. The background remains the same with framed art and a desk lamp.
A medium close-up shot of Character B against his plain blue background. He is listening intently to Character A, nodding along.

scenes.visual_description: The scene continues the video call between Character A and Character B. As Character A speaks, the MySivi logo appears. The video then cuts to a shot of Character C in a dark room, looking at his phone, from which a glowing orange holographic robot emerges. It then cuts to a split-screen of Character E and Character D on a phone call in a living room. It then cuts to another split-screen of Character F and Character G on a phone call. The scene frequently returns to the main video call between A and B.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: See, there is an application called MySivi. It is a very interesting application because you have an AI feature and you also have a co-learners calling. The best feature that I love the most is that you can also talk to other learners in English and you can practice with them in real time and improve your English. And there is no fear of judgment.

scenes.setting: The video call continues. A graphic overlay of the Apple App Store 'Top Charts' page is shown.
scenes.camera: Screen-recorded video call, with an inset graphic overlay.

panels.panel_visual_description: A medium close-up shot of Character A in his home office. He speaks reassuringly and gives a final thumbs-up at the end. The background remains the same.
A medium close-up shot of Character B against his plain blue background. He asks a question and then smiles and nods in agreement.

scenes.visual_description: The video call between Character A and Character B concludes. As B asks a question, a green checkmark icon appears. As A answers, a graphic overlay of the App Store's 'Top Charts' page appears over the video call, showing the MySivi app ranked at number 2. The scene ends with Character A giving a thumbs-up.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Is it safe?

Character A says: 40 lakhs people are already using this app and this is one of the top-rated English learning apps in India. So you can definitely give it a try.

Character B says: Okay, I will install now and practice daily.

Character A says: Perfect.
